title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL OF SOUTH COTABATO FROM ONE HUNDRED (100) TO ONE HUNDRED TWENTY-FIVE (125) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. NO. 1100 / 88 OG No. 19, 2724 (May 11, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7286, March 24, 1992 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL OF SOUTH COTABATO FROM ONE HUNDRED (100) TO ONE HUNDRED TWENTY-FIVE (125) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The provincial hospital of South Cotabato located in the capital town of Koronadal is hereby expanded from one hundred (100) to one hundred twenty-five (125) beds.

SEC 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 3, 1992 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 24, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
